name: Shapeways
description: Shapeways OAuth2 API for JSON/base64 model uploads, printability and material pricing, shipping options, fulfillment orders, and shipment tracking.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Shapeways OAuth2 access token. Tokens normally expire after one hour; prefer Authorize so refresh tokens are managed automatically.

tools.name: get_material
tools.description: Get detailed information for a Shapeways material.

tools.name: upload_model
tools.description: Upload a model as a JSON body. Pass base64-encoded model bytes in file, explicitly confirm model rights and terms, then poll get_model until printability and per-material prices are available. uploadScale is required for STL, OBJ, and VOX files.

file.description: Base64-encoded model file data. Do not pass a public URL or raw binary.

uploadScale.description: Scale in meters. Required by Shapeways for STL, OBJ, and VOX files.

hasRightsToModel.description: Must be true only when the caller owns or is authorized to use this model.

acceptTermsAndConditions.description: Must be true to accept the current Shapeways terms for this upload.

materials.description: Optional material-id keyed settings containing markup and isActive.

page.description: One-based page; Shapeways returns 36 models per page.

tools.name: get_model
tools.description: Get Shapeways model information and printability/material checks.

tools.name: delete_model
tools.description: Permanently delete a Shapeways model. Resolve and inspect the model with get_model first; do not retry a successful deletion.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Create and charge a Shapeways fulfillment order. This is a billable action: obtain shipping choices first, verify every model/material with get_model, and confirm the address and quantities before calling.

country.description: Country name or ISO 3166 two-letter code.

state.description: State/region; use the two-letter abbreviation in the US.

paymentVerificationId.description: Shapeways-issued payment authorization id when required for the application.

refNumber.description: Reference printed on the packing slip and invoice.

metadata.description: Application-specific metadata, available only to approved applications.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: List Shapeways orders and their fulfillment status. Optionally restrict the response to a comma-separated set of order ids.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get Shapeways order details and status.

tools.name: get_shipping_options
tools.description: Get shipping options for a destination country and optional zip/postal code.
